category_sources: source_facts.description says Eight player Bomberman clone; official GitHub README describes Mr.Boom as an 8 player Bomberman clone for RetroArch/Libretro and SDL

docs_sources: Official upstream GitHub README documents building and features; Libretro official docs document the Mr.Boom core
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/Javanaise/mrboom-libretro, so repo is returned as null per instruction
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official upstream README identify an up-to-eight-player Bomberman clone for Libretro/RetroArch and SDL
